summary: Home Tiffin MVP tested end-to-end. Backend: 23/24 pytest cases pass (1 skipped: no 'cutoff-passed' upcoming order exists today since today=Sunday is a holiday — validation logic itself is still correct because tomorrow's cutoff hasn't passed yet). Frontend: Customer login (phone+OTP with dev banner), home greeting, today/tomorrow meal cards, 8 PM cutoff banner, and tomorrow's +/- quantity buttons all work and write through to the API. Delivery login lands on Route screen with Deliveries/Pickups chip tabs; the seeded yesterday Sharma Family hotbox-pickup appears under Pickups and 'Mark Hotbox Picked' successfully removes it. Today is Sunday so deliveries list is empty (holiday) — consistent with spec. Seed for Sharma pickup was restored after testing so subsequent runs can re-verify. Minor: deprecation warnings 'shadow* style props' and 'props.pointerEvents' surfaced from RN web layer (cosmetic).

minor.issue: JWT_SECRET is 27 bytes (<32) — triggers PyJWT InsecureKeyLengthWarning. Use a >=32 byte secret via env var for production.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web shows deprecation: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Originates from theme.ts/shadow.card usage. Reference: /app/frontend/src/lib/theme.* (used in login.tsx & home.tsx). Cosmetic only.
Deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Likely from a third-party (LinearGradient/Pressable) — review on next RN/Expo SDK bump.

action_items: (Optional) Increase JWT_SECRET length to >=32 bytes to silence PyJWT warning.
(Optional) Migrate shadow* styles to boxShadow in /app/frontend/src/lib/theme.* to clear RN-Web deprecation noise.
(Optional) Track down pointerEvents prop usage and move it to style.pointerEvents.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 700-line module — fine for MVP but consider splitting into routers (auth/menu/orders/admin/delivery) once it grows further.
_seed inserts subscriptions/orders idempotently — good. But hotbox-pending seed only runs when the yesterday order does not yet exist; once consumed, it cannot be auto-restored. Acceptable for dev.
Order PATCH validates quantity 0..3 server-side AND client disables +/- at bounds — good.
seed_data_creation: Restored Sharma Family yesterday hotbox-pickup (delivered=true, hotbox_collected=false) after tests consumed it, so the next test agent and the live preview both see the demo pickup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://fresh-feast-app-1.preview.emergentagent.com. All APIs under /api. Login: send-otp returns dev_otp; verify-otp returns {token,user}. Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` for backend regression. Today is Sunday (server-side IST date), so customer 'today' meals are empty (holiday) and tomorrow is Monday with a normal order — useful for testing the editable +/- card. If running on a Sunday again, expect the 'modify_order_after_cutoff' test to skip (no cutoff-passed upcoming row). Admin frontend (Dashboard/Orders/Menu) and customer Menu/Profile screens were not interactively browsed but their backing APIs all return correct data (validated via pytest).
